name: Nova Mesh Event Contract
purpose: Standard payload for every event entering Nova Mesh Core.

event_id.description: Optional unique event ID. If missing, the receiver should generate one.

timestamp.description: Optional event time. If missing, the receiver should use current time.

payload.description: Raw event data from the source app.

summary_for_ai.description: Compressed, AI-readable summary of the event.

next_action.description: Recommended next action generated by a router, compressor or human.

route_hint.description: Optional routing hint such as make.primary, zapier.fallback, yepcode.adapter, gmail.escalation.

correlation_id.description: Groups related events in one workflow or incident.

example.summary_for_ai: Make sent a test event to confirm the bridge path.
example.next_action: Record event and return status ok.
